calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2020 Continued To Mar-10-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Charles C. Thompson.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Reporter: Lisa Schafer, CSR #12723. Email: lschafer@sftc.org.

D. Wilson Jordan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Evelyn Sican, Loan Adjuster for plaintiff, was placed under and testified.
Both Mr. Jordan and Ms. Sican appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Charles C. Thompson.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed on March 26, 2019.
Order permitting service of plaintiff's Summons & Complaint via publication was filed on February 26, 2020.
Proof of Publication was filed on April 30, 2020.
Default as to defendant Charles C. Thompson was entered on August 6, 2020.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against defendant Charles C. Thompson, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $26,022.96. (Amount pled in complaint).
Attorney Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $949.41.

Total - $27,772.37.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-13-2020 Continued To Dec-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
